description: Vision fallback rules for screenshot-based analysis when DOM fails
when_to_use: Element not found in DOM but should be visible on page
Page state unclear after action (did it succeed?)
Canvas/custom UI with no DOM elements (games, editors, maps)
DOM verification failed — need visual confirmation
Element is inside Shadow DOM that wasn't pierced
CAPTCHA detected — need to describe what's shown
Layout changed — old selectors don't work

screenshot_analyze.description: Take screenshot + analyze with vision model
screenshot_analyze.when: DOM snapshot is insufficient or element not found
screenshot_analyze.returns: Description of visible elements + their locations

element_finding.description: Use vision to locate an element that DOM can't find
element_finding.prompt_template: Find the {element_description} on this page. Return its approximate position (x, y coordinates) and any text near it.
element_finding.when: act() or observe() couldn't find the element via DOM

state_verification.description: Verify page state visually after an action
state_verification.prompt_template: After clicking '{action}', what is the current page state? Is there a success message, error, or new page loaded?
state_verification.when: Validator can't determine success from DOM alone

analysis_prompts.find_element: Look at this webpage screenshot. I need to find: {description}. Where is it? Describe its position and any identifying text nearby.
analysis_prompts.verify_action: I just performed this action: {action}. Look at the current screenshot. Did the action succeed? What changed? Is there an error message?
analysis_prompts.describe_page: Describe what's currently visible on this page. What are the main sections, buttons, and interactive elements?
analysis_prompts.captcha_help: There appears to be a CAPTCHA on this page. Describe what type it is (text, image, puzzle) and what it shows.
analysis_prompts.error_detection: Is there any error message, warning, or unexpected state on this page? Describe anything that looks wrong.
analysis_prompts.form_state: Look at this form. Which fields are filled? Which are empty? Are there any validation errors shown?

fallback_cascade.description: When DOM fails, try vision in order
steps: 1. DOM snapshot → element found → use DOM refs
2. DOM snapshot → element NOT found → try re-snapshot (maybe stale)
3. Re-snapshot → still not found → screenshot + vision analysis
4. Vision finds element → use coordinates or description to interact
5. Vision can't find → report to user with screenshot

suggested_action.description: What to try next if element not found

limitations: Vision is slower than DOM (screenshot + analysis = ~2-3s extra)
Coordinate-based clicking is less reliable than ref-based
Vision can't read small text or low-contrast elements reliably
Some visual elements are decorative, not interactive
Use vision as fallback, not primary method
